title: Todo Task Manager
description: A task management app that lets users create, edit, delete, and store tasks using localStorage with a clean responsive interface.

title: Weather App
description: A weather forecast application that fetches real-time weather data from an API and displays temperature, humidity, and conditions.

title: Kanban Task Board
description: A Trello-like Kanban board with drag-and-drop functionality for managing tasks across multiple workflow stages.

title: Markdown Previewer
description: A live markdown editor that instantly converts markdown text into formatted HTML with real-time preview.

title: Chat UI Interface
description: A responsive chat interface design that simulates messaging with dynamic message rendering and modern UI layout.
